overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a tactical shooter game resembling Escape from Tarkov. The player navigates through a green-tiled underground medical facility, witnesses a confrontation between an armed guard and a surrendering prisoner, and discovers a dead body in a bathroom. The environment features fluorescent lighting, industrial clean-room aesthetics, and tense atmosphere.

events.description: moves from observation room into the main green-tiled corridor
slows approach toward doorway with visible characters ahead

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through the corridor toward a room with visible occupants

notable_agents.action: armed guard standing in doorway ahead holding rifle
prisoner with hands raised in surrender position

wall covered in small green ceramic tiles with white lower section
metal hospital gurney with blue padding sitting in corridor
metal staircase with green tile surround leading upward
bright purple vending machine with glowing display screen

segments.scene_description: The player begins looking through an observation window into a green-tiled room, then moves into the corridor. The environment features medical equipment, a purple vending machine, and fluorescent lighting. Ahead, two characters are visible in a doorway - one armed guard and one surrendering prisoner.

events.description: enters the small room from the green corridor
the surrendering character is shot and falls to the ground

agents.ego_description: entering the small room to observe the confrontation at close range

notable_agents.action: armed guard in tactical gear holding rifle on the prisoner
muscular prisoner in tank top and camo pants with hands raised

simple bed with white sheets and pillow against the right wall
single chair with blue upholstery in the corner
informational poster or notice board on the far wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters a small room where an armed guard holds a prisoner at gunpoint. The room contains a hospital bed and a blue chair. At around 14 seconds, the prisoner is shot and collapses. The player moves around the scene observing the interaction.

events.description: exits the small room back into the green-tiled corridor
approaches and enters the bathroom doorway

agents.ego_description: leaving the confrontation room and moving toward the bathroom facilities

entered.detail: doorway leading to white-tiled bathroom area
blue utility cart with cleaning supplies and wire racks

segments.scene_description: The player exits the room and moves through the green corridor toward a bathroom. The environment is empty of living characters, with only the sound of footsteps. A cleaning cart is visible near the bathroom entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: bathroom with shower stall and toilet

events.description: discovers dead body lying in the shower stall with blood splatter
slows to examine the body and blood splatter on the wall

agents.ego_description: cautiously entering the bathroom and examining the dead body in the shower stall

notable_agents.action: dead body of a person in purple shorts lying on the shower floor

entered.detail: wall-mounted white ceramic sink with mirror above
white ceramic toilet with open lid and tank
shower area with white tiles and exposed plumbing fixtures
corpse lying face down in purple shorts with visible wounds
dark blood splatter pattern on the white shower wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters a white-tiled bathroom and discovers a gruesome scene - a dead body lies in the shower stall with significant blood splatter on the walls. The player approaches the body for closer inspection before preparing to leave.

scene_state.functional_zone: green-tiled facility corridor with medical storage

events.description: exits the bathroom back to the main green-tiled corridor
turns to explore different section of the corridor near the staircase

agents.ego_description: moving back through the facility corridors, surveying the environment and looking around

entered.detail: closed metal roll-down security gate blocking the corridor end
large grey equipment crate with yellow accents and warning labels
empty black wheelchair parked near the staircase

segments.scene_description: The player exits the bathroom and explores the corridor, passing medical equipment crates and a wheelchair. The environment shows signs of abandonment with scattered items. The player moves toward a metal security gate and circles back toward the staircase area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective through a sterile medical facility that shifts from a tense confrontation to a grim discovery of abandonment. It begins by peering through an observation window into a green-tiled room before moving into a fluorescent corridor past a purple vending machine toward two figures in a doorway. As the camera enters a small room containing a hospital bed, the scene unfolds with an armed guard shooting a surrendering prisoner, who collapses to the floor. The camera then retreats back into the empty green corridor, passing a cleaning cart before entering a white-tiled bathroom to reveal a dead body and blood splatter within a shower stall. Finally, the view shifts back into the hallway to pass scattered medical crates and a wheelchair, moving toward a metal security gate and circling back toward a staircase.
